question: Who wrote the music and lyrics for the show that won Best Musical at the 2026 Tony Awards?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
"Schmigadoon!" won Best Musical at the 2026 Tony Awards, and its book, music, and lyrics were written by Cinco Paul.

Sources: https://americantheatrewing.org/news-events/2026-tony-award-winners/ and https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Schmigadoon!_(musical)

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer: **Cinco Paul** wrote both the music and lyrics for *Schmigadoon!*, which won Best Musical at the 2026 Tony Awards. Sources: [American Theatre Wing](https://americantheatrewing.org/news-events/2026-tony-award-winners/), [NPR](https://www.npr.org/2026/06/07/nx-s1-5843086/tony-awards-winners-list-2026).
